overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at dusk. The camera moves along a wet reflective promenade past palm trees and construction barriers, then opens to a panoramic water view with distant industrial structures, before descending to a lower waterfront walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban promenade with construction barriers and palm trees

events.description: NPC with purple hair and headphones passes close by on the right, temporarily blocking view
passing by a food vendor cart on the left side
approaching the open waterfront area as the construction wall ends

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet tiled promenade between palm trees and a construction wall

notable_agents.action: character with purple hair and large headphones walking past camera
vendor standing behind a food cart with glowing display

entered.detail: tall beige barrier with illuminated Asian characters
tropical palm trees in raised planters
tall illuminated display screens showing advertisements
tall dark glass towers with illuminated windows
wide concrete stairs leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet urban promenade lined with palm trees and green benches on the left, and a tall construction wall with illuminated signage on the right. The path leads toward futuristic glass skyscrapers in the distance while various NPCs walk past, including a character with distinctive purple hair and headphones.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront overlook with panoramic water views

events.description: exits the enclosed promenade into the open waterfront overlook with railing
turns left to follow the waterfront path along the railing
passes by a couple embracing at the railing overlooking the water

agents.ego_description: reaches the waterfront railing, turns left, and walks along the water's edge

notable_agents.action: couple standing close together embracing while looking out at the water
group of people standing at the railing observing distant structures

entered.detail: metal and glass safety barrier at the water's edge
calm water surface reflecting the dusk sky
large rectangular structures on the horizon across the water
covered walkway beneath the main promenade level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a panoramic waterfront view at dusk, with the camera turning left to follow the railing. The water stretches out to distant industrial platforms on the horizon, while people stand at the railing observing the view. The glass skyscrapers now dominate the right side of the frame as the enclosed promenade falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower waterfront walkway beneath the upper promenade overhang

events.description: descends concrete steps to the lower waterfront level
passes by a person sitting on the steps near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walks down the steps to the lower promenade and continues along the water under the overhang

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the concrete steps looking out at the water
character in gray jacket walking ahead on the lower path

entered.detail: wide steps leading down to the lower waterfront level
concrete underside of the upper level creating a covered walkway
illuminated blue and red signs on the building facade
dark building extending over the water at the lower level

segments.scene_description: Descending to the lower waterfront level via concrete steps, the camera moves under the overhang of the upper promenade. Neon signage illuminates the building facade on the right, while the water is now much closer on the left. The space feels more enclosed and sheltered compared to the open overlook above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban promenade that opens into a panoramic waterfront view before descending into a sheltered lower walkway. It begins by moving along a wet path lined with palm trees and green benches, passing pedestrians and a construction wall with illuminated signage beneath towering glass skyscrapers. As the enclosed promenade falls behind, the camera turns left to follow a railing, expanding the view toward distant industrial platforms on the horizon under a dusk sky. The scene then shifts as the camera descends concrete steps, moving under the overhang of the upper level where the space becomes more intimate. Finally, the perspective settles on the lower waterfront level, with neon signage illuminating the building facade on the right while the water flows closely on the left.
